subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter dated 9 Shawwal 1339 was received by that honored and exalted personage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما که بتاریخ نهم شوال ۱۳۳۹ بود رسید بشخص محترم و والا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @predictions and prophecies, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
